reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención.  Baños limpios y  el bar  es cómodo y bien atendido. Solo es complicado conseguir estacionamiento.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Clean restrooms and a comfortable, well-staffed bar. The only downside is that parking is difficult.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena ubicación, buen precio. Atención más o menos, demoran mucho, pocos playeros.

(Translated by Google)
Great location, good price. Service is so-so, they take a long time, and there aren't enough staff.

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio! Tienen diesel 500!!
Los empleados de los surtidores demoran un poco, pero es porque hay mucha demanda, lo que destacó que no me gusta y no está bien, es que dejen hacer la fila a los conductores sobre la senda peatonal, no dejan pasar a la gente!!!

(Translated by Google)
Good service! They have diesel 500!!
The pump attendants are a little slow, but that's because there's a lot of demand. What I don't like, and what's not right, is that they let drivers line up on the pedestrian walkway; they don't let other people through!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4ckxqeHB3RRAB
